name: voice-gender-recognition

metadata.name: voice-gender-recognition
metadata.summary: A voice gender recognition package using machine learning

documentation:
# Voice Gender Recognition

A Python package for real-time voice gender recognition using machine learning.

## Installation

functions.name: voice_gender_recognition.core.predict_gender
documentation:
Predict gender from audio file or live recording

Args:
    file (str, optional): Path to audio file. If None, records from microphone
    model_path (str): Path to the trained model weights
    
Returns:
    tuple: (predicted_gender, male_probability, female_probability)
